steps.title: Substitute the temperature
steps.content:
The formula gives the Fahrenheit temperature from the kelvin temperature. Substitute $$h=557.33$$
$$557.33=\frac{9(v-273.15)}{5}+32$$

steps.title: Solve for kelvins
steps.content: Undo the operations on $v$ by subtracting $32$, multiplying by $$\frac{5}{9}$$, then adding $273.15$. $$525.33=\frac{9(v-273.15)}{5}$$ $$291.85=v-273.15$$ $$v=565$$ The answer is 565.
